fields.label: Package Name
fields.description: Unique name for this subscription package (e.g., Free, Basic, Professional, Enterprise)

fields.label: Package Code
fields.description: Short code for programmatic use (e.g., FREE, BASIC, PRO, ENTERPRISE)

fields.label: Package Rank
fields.description: Numeric rank for ordering packages (1=lowest tier, higher=better)

fields.label: Is Default Package
fields.description: New sellers are automatically assigned to this package

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon name or class (e.g., fa-box, fa-rocket, fa-crown, fa-building)

fields.label: Color
fields.description: Color associated with this package for display

fields.label: Billing Period
fields.description: How often the subscription is billed

fields.label: Price
fields.description: Subscription price per billing period

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency for pricing

fields.label: Setup Fee
fields.description: One-time setup fee for new subscribers

fields.label: Trial Days
fields.description: Number of free trial days before billing starts

fields.label: Auto Renew
fields.description: Automatically renew subscription at end of billing period

fields.label: Annual Discount
fields.description: Discount percentage when paying annually

fields.label: Promotional Price
fields.description: Special promotional price (if applicable)

fields.label: Promotion Valid Until
fields.description: End date for promotional pricing

fields.label: Max Products
fields.description: Maximum number of products allowed (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Max SKUs per Product
fields.description: Maximum SKU variants per product (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Max Orders per Month
fields.description: Maximum orders processed per month (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Max Storage (MB)
fields.description: Maximum storage space in megabytes (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Max API Calls/Day
fields.description: Maximum API calls per day (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Max Team Members
fields.description: Maximum team members allowed (0=unlimited)

fields.label: Analytics Dashboard
fields.description: Access to analytics and reporting dashboard

fields.label: Priority Support
fields.description: Access to priority customer support

fields.label: Custom Domain
fields.description: Ability to use custom domain for store

fields.label: API Access
fields.description: Access to API for integrations

fields.label: Bulk Import/Export
fields.description: Ability to bulk import and export products

fields.label: Advanced Reporting
fields.description: Access to advanced reporting features

fields.label: Multi-Warehouse
fields.description: Support for multiple warehouse locations

fields.label: White Label
fields.description: Remove platform branding

fields.label: Commission Rate
fields.description: Platform commission rate on sales

fields.label: Transaction Fee
fields.description: Additional transaction fee percentage

fields.label: Minimum Transaction Fee
fields.description: Minimum fee per transaction

fields.label: Fee Cap per Transaction
fields.description: Maximum fee cap per transaction (0=no cap)

fields.label: Grace Period (Days)
fields.description: Days after due date before subscription is considered overdue

fields.label: Warning Days Before Suspension
fields.description: Days before suspension to send warning notification

fields.label: Auto Suspend on Overdue
fields.description: Automatically suspend API access when subscription is overdue

fields.label: Suspend After (Days)
fields.description: Days after due date to suspend access (including grace period)

fields.label: Display Name
fields.description: Name shown to customers (can be different from package_name)

fields.label: Short Description
fields.description: Brief description for pricing cards

fields.label: Full Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the package

fields.label: Badge Image
fields.description: Badge or icon image for the package

fields.label: Highlight Features
fields.description: Key features to highlight (one per line)

fields.label: Is Public
fields.description: Show this package on public pricing page

fields.label: Is Featured
fields.description: Highlight this package as recommended

fields.label: Target Audience
fields.options:
Small Business
Medium Business
Enterprise
Individual Sellers
fields.description: Primary target audience for this package

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order in which package appears on pricing page

fields.label: Upgrade To
fields.description: Recommended package to upgrade to

fields.label: Downgrade To
fields.description: Package to downgrade to if needed

fields.label: Allow Upgrade
fields.description: Allow subscribers to upgrade from this package

fields.label: Allow Downgrade
fields.description: Allow subscribers to downgrade from this package

fields.label: Prorate on Package Change
fields.description: Prorate charges when upgrading/downgrading

fields.label: Total Subscribers
fields.description: Total number of subscribers on this package

fields.label: Active Subscribers
fields.description: Number of currently active subscribers

fields.label: Total Revenue
fields.description: Total revenue generated from this package

fields.label: Last Calculated At
fields.description: When statistics were last calculated
